title: Limerick, Limerick — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Limerick, Limerick: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Limerick is a city in Limerick with a population of 94,000. A historic city on the River Shannon, known for its medieval King John’s Castle, the Hunt Museum, and a growing technology and pharmaceutical sector.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
